stemHtml: You are established on a 10 NM parallel track to your airway. What will happen if your aircraft now turns by more than 90 degrees?

options.a: The RNAV system will discontinue the offset.
options.b: The aircraft will return to the defined route.
options.c: LNAV will disengage and control wheel steering mode will engage.
options.d: The RNAV system will command a holding.
